02

About Me

NK
Neha Kamble

Hello! I'm Neha Kamble.

A UX Engineer & AI Product Architect based in Pune, Maharashtra. I sit at the intersection of design, engineering, and artificial intelligence — crafting products that are not just beautiful, but genuinely intelligent.

I specialise in translating complex AI capabilities into intuitive user experiences, architecting product systems that scale with both technology and human needs. My work spans research, interaction design, front-end engineering, and AI product strategy.

When I'm not building things, I'm exploring emerging AI research, sketching product concepts, and thinking about how technology can be made more humane.
